page.title: Me
page.unauthDescription: Configure your preferences and system settings.
page.unauthSignInHint: Please sign in using the button in the header to get started.

userEmail.label: User Email
userEmail.hint: Used for displaying your Gravatar avatar in the header.

logLevel.label: Log Level
logLevel.hint: A browser refresh or server restart may be required to apply.

languages.label: Languages
languages.hint: Languages you use, in order of preference. Drag to reorder.

uiLanguage.label: Display language
uiLanguage.hint: The language used for MyLifeDB's interface. Empty follows your browser/system.

vendors.title: Vendor Configuration
vendors.subtitle: Configure third-party vendor endpoints and credentials

openaiModel.label: OpenAI - Model
openaiModel.hint: Used for all LLM tasks. Leave blank to use default.

qdrantHost.label: Search - Qdrant Host
qdrantHost.hint: Base URL for the Qdrant vector service used by semantic search.

modelSelector.title: Select OpenAI Model
modelSelector.noModels: No models found. Check your API key permissions.

digest.title: Digester Configuration
digest.subtitle: Enable or disable individual digesters for file processing

digestReset.description: This will delete all existing {{name}} digests and trigger regeneration for all files. Use this to refresh data after changing settings or to fix processing errors.
